transitions.name: start_data_ingestion
transitions.description: Initiate the data ingestion process from the Automation Exercise API.
transitions.start_state_description: Initial state before the data ingestion job is executed.
transitions.end_state_description: Raw data has been successfully ingested from the API.

process.name: ingest_raw_data
process.description: Process to fetch raw data from the specified API.

transitions.name: schedule_daily_ingestion
transitions.description: Schedule the data ingestion job to run daily.
transitions.end_state_description: Data ingestion job has been scheduled for daily execution.

process.name: schedule_job
process.description: Process to schedule the data ingestion job.

transitions.name: transform_data
transitions.description: Transform the raw data into a processed format.
transitions.start_state_description: Raw data has been ingested and is ready for processing.

process.name: process_raw_data
process.description: Process to transform and aggregate raw data.

transitions.name: aggregate_data
transitions.description: Aggregate the processed data for reporting.
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been transformed and is ready for aggregation.

process.name: aggregate_processed_data
process.description: Process to aggregate processed data for reporting.

transitions.name: generate_report
transitions.description: Generate a report based on the aggregated data.
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been aggregated and is ready for reporting.
transitions.end_state_description: The report has been successfully generated.

process.name: create_report
process.description: Process to create and format the report.

transitions.name: send_report
transitions.description: Send the generated report to the admin email.
transitions.start_state_description: The report has been created and is ready to be sent.
transitions.end_state_description: The report has been successfully sent to the admin.

process.name: email_report
process.description: Process to send the report via email.
